The maker of this website has a small token of appreciation for you…
Your garden, gathered with love
Do you love your bouquet?
A letter waits for you
touch the seal to break it open

This following message should only be read on the auspicious date of 5th July, although you may read it anytime after that.

Happy Birthday, my dear radiant, adorable, and ever-optimistic turtle 🐢 the one who somehow makes even the quietest moments feel worth remembering.

It's my first time writing a letter like this because, until now, I've never really felt the need to. It always seemed like overkill. But that has changed drastically with you.

Compared to what you've quietly done for my life often without even knowing it a letter feels almost too small. But it's what I have, so here it is.

I hope this day brings you endless joy, beautiful moments, lots of love and memories that you'll cherish for years to come.

I hope today and all the days ahead show you just how precious a gem you are to this world. I do not wish for your struggles to disappear completely; instead, I wish you strength, integrity, courage, and an even stronger willpower to overcome them. After all, those very challenges continue to shape you into an even better human being than you already are. And for what it's worth the person those challenges have already shaped? She's extraordinary. I hope one day you see her the way everyone around you does.

Aur waise bhi, tum toh unke favourite ho. Toh tumhe itni chinta karne ki bhi zarurat nahi hai, because He is always by your side. Tumne mujhe yahi sikhaya hai ki kuch cheezein hamare haath mein nahi hoti, aur phir bhi sab theek ho jaata hai. And all of us will be cheering for you, your happiness, and everything you dream of achieving.

Main jaanta hoon ki tum bahut kuch andar rakh leti ho kyunki tumhe lagta hai ki doosron ko takleef na ho. But I want you to know: jo tum share karti ho, jo tum feel karti ho woh kabhi burden nahi hoga. Not for me. Not ever.

Once again, Happy Birthday. May you never lose that beautiful radiance that makes you, you even on the days it feels dim. 💙🫠🫶🩷🩵🧿🌟✨⭐💫

— with love

Happy Birthday, dear Arpita. 🌻
May this year bring you everything your heart has been quietly hoping for. May you always be surrounded by warmth, wonder, and all the love you deserve.
